Package com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.event

Class JobLevelUpEvent

java.lang.Object
com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.event.JobLevelUpEvent
All Implemented Interfaces:
RealmEvent
public final class JobLevelUpEvent extends Object implements RealmEvent
Event published when a player levels up in a job.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description
    JobLevelUpEvent(UUID playerUuid, String playerName, String jobId, int oldLevel, int newLevel)
    Creates a job level-up event.

    Method
    Description

    Timestamp when the event instance was created.

    Returns the job in which the player leveled up.

    Returns the new job level.
    int
    oldLevel()
    Returns the previous job level.
    String
    playerName()
    Returns the player name at the time of the level-up.

    Returns the UUID of the player who leveled up.

  • Constructor Details

    • JobLevelUpEvent

      public JobLevelUpEvent(UUID playerUuid, String playerName, String jobId, int oldLevel, int newLevel)
      Creates a job level-up event.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - player UUID
      playerName - player name at time of level-up
      jobId - job identifier
      oldLevel - previous level
      newLevel - new level
